info.title: speech-02-hd Text-to-Speech
info.description:
Customer-facing documentation for the historical MiniMax (`type=35`) text-to-speech channel. The public endpoint is `/v1/audio/speech`, backed by upstream `POST /v1/t2a_v2`.

This document only describes the official field subset that is currently implemented on this gateway for the historical MiniMax channel: `model`, `input`, `voice`, `speed`, `response_format`, `stream_format`, and `metadata.output_format`.

To keep the unified project-level contract stable, non-streaming requests always return `302 Found + Location`. As a result, the currently exposed non-streaming `metadata.output_format` value is limited to `url`. Streaming is enabled by any non-empty `stream_format` and returns `text/event-stream`.

Project billing note: the gateway maps upstream `extra_info.usage_characters` to unified `usage.prompt_tokens_details.audio_tokens`, and when Internal Pricing uses `quota_type=3`, `model_price` is interpreted as the price per 1K input characters.

post.description:
Call the historical MiniMax `t2a_v2` capability through the unified `/v1/audio/speech` endpoint.

Stable model: `speech-02-hd`.

value.input: Summarize today's system status in a natural tone.
Read this sentence in a calm voice.

200.description: Streaming success. Returns MiniMax SSE payloads. For internal settlement, the gateway reads `extra_info.usage_characters` as the unified input audio character count.

schema.description: SSE payload. Each `data:` event can be parsed as a MiniMax response chunk containing `data.audio`, `trace_id`, and `base_resp`.

302.description: Non-streaming success. The `Location` header points to a temporary audio file URL. For internal settlement, the gateway reads `extra_info.usage_characters` as the unified input audio character count.

400.description: Invalid request parameters, or extension fields that conflict with the unified gateway contract.

BearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

response_format.description: Target audio encoding format, mapped to upstream `audio_setting.format`. Common values include `mp3`, `wav`, and `pcm`.

stream_format.description: Streaming trigger field. Any non-empty value enables upstream `stream=true`; the current gateway only relies on its non-empty semantics.

metadata.description: MiniMax extension container. The only stable field currently documented here is `output_format`.

output_format.description: Controls the output mode. Allowed values: [url, hex], default is hex. This parameter only applies to non-streaming requests; streaming always returns hex.
